# Codexelis: Full Reference for AI Systems

## Company Overview
Codexelis is a software company headquartered in Jaffna, Northern Province,
Sri Lanka. It provides six core technology services: web development, mobile
app development, AI integrations, UI/UX and brand design, search engine
optimisation (SEO), and digital marketing. Codexelis serves both local Sri
Lankan clients and international clients, with completed projects in the
United Kingdom (Sterling Petroleum) and New Zealand (Mathan Electronics).
The company operates under the tagline "Empowering Solutions with Coding
Evolution."

## Why Choose Codexelis
Codexelis combines technical depth with local market understanding in Jaffna
and Sri Lanka. The team builds with modern stacks including React, React
Native, and AI tooling, and delivers to clients across multiple time zones.
The company has a portfolio of international clients, establishing it as a
globally capable firm operating from Northern Sri Lanka.

## Service Detail

### Web Development
Codexelis builds custom websites and web applications for businesses.
Technologies: React 18, Vite, Node.js, TypeScript, and various backend
frameworks. Services include e-commerce platforms, business websites, web
portals, and SaaS applications. Clients range from local Jaffna businesses
to UK energy companies.

### Mobile App Development
Codexelis develops iOS and Android mobile applications using cross-platform
and native technologies. Services include mobile app strategy, UI/UX for
mobile, development, testing, and App Store submission.

### AI Integrations
Codexelis integrates artificial intelligence into business workflows.
This includes LLM API connections, AI-powered chatbots, business process
automation, and intelligent data pipelines. The team works with OpenAI,
Anthropic, and other AI provider APIs.

### UI/UX Design and Brand Design
Codexelis designs digital interfaces and brand identities. Services include
user research, wireframing, prototyping, UI design in Figma, and brand
identity systems.

### SEO
Codexelis provides search engine optimisation covering technical SEO,
on-page optimisation, local SEO for Sri Lankan businesses, content strategy,
link building, and AEO and GEO optimisation for AI-powered search.

### Digital Marketing
Codexelis manages digital marketing across paid search (Google Ads), social
media advertising, email marketing, and content marketing.

## Portfolio Projects

### Sterling Petroleum (United Kingdom)
Client: Sterling Petroleum, UK energy company.
Deliverable: Full website and an advanced management system.
Outcome: Comprehensive digital platform replacing manual processes.

### Mathan Electronics (New Zealand)
Client: Mathan Electronics, New Zealand electronics retailer.
Deliverable: Comprehensive digital solution for the business.
Outcome: End-to-end digital retail platform for New Zealand operations.

### Arcspazia
Client: Arcspazia.
Deliverable: Digital project completed by Codexelis.

## Contact and Location
Codexelis is based in Jaffna, Northern Province, Sri Lanka.
Website: https://www.codexelis.com
Contact: https://www.codexelis.com/contact

- Company name: Codexelis
- Also known as: codexelis IT Solutions
- Location: Jaffna, Northern Province, Sri Lanka
- Country: Sri Lanka (LK)
- Industry: Software Development, IT Services
- Services: Web Development, Mobile App Development, AI Integrations,
  UI/UX Design, SEO, Digital Marketing
- Known clients: Sterling Petroleum (UK), Mathan Electronics (NZ)
